externalOps.note: Version metadata bumped to 1.0.4 from keep-this-block baseline (365ef85). Runtime evidence, verifiedDistSha256 freeze, tag/zip/GitHub Release, and awesome-orcanote PR remain open.

acceptedRisks.summary: EPUB ZIP 中央目录声明预算未独立预检
acceptedRisks.detail: Static audit residual: ZIP central-directory declared-size budget is not independently preflighted before import. Maintainer accepts this remaining risk for the 1.0.4 release decision; it is not claimed fixed.

acceptedRisks.summary: EPUB/Web/AI 写入阶段取消未形成统一可中断事务
acceptedRisks.detail: Static audit residual: EPUB import write/resume, web import, and AI save cancellation paths are not unified into a single interruptible transaction model. Maintainer accepts this remaining risk for the 1.0.4 release decision; it is not claimed fixed.

decision.statement: Metadata version is 1.0.4. Formal Go requires maintainer runtime acceptance, frozen verifiedDistSha256, empty blockers, and tag/zip pipeline.
